title: Spurious log message from FTS3
key_bug_features: Spurious log message generation in FTS3
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE user_comments USING fts3(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, comment TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO user_comments (comment) VALUES ('This is a test comment.');
SELECT * FROM user_comments WHERE comment IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_comments WHERE LENGTH(comment) < 10;
